en.name: Level 82 — Self-Automated Trade
en.shortDescription: A Victorian indoor market run by hostile entities acting as traders, open on a strict schedule with violent closures.
en.atmosphere: Commercial yet threatening — entities trade grudgingly while staying predatory, and closing time means forced eviction.
en.tips: Trade fairly, don't linger, and leave before 9 PM closing. Cheating a trader gets you killed on the spot; re-entry after eviction is fatal.
